sentences.arabic: تُحَضِّرُ أُمِّي طَبَقَ الْكَبْسَةِ الشَّهِيَّ فِي يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moja majka priprema ukusno jelo kabsu petkom.
sentences.translationEn: My mother prepares the delicious Kabsa dish on Fridays.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ أَرُزَّ الْبَسْمَتِي وَالدَّجَاجَ وَالْكَثِيرَ مِنَ التَّوَابِلِ الْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ona koristi basmati rižu, piletinu i mnogo posebnih začina.
sentences.translationEn: She uses basmati rice, chicken, and many special spices.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ الْمَائِدَةِ لِتَنَاوُلِ هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Porodica se okuplja oko stola kako bi zajedno jeli ovaj obrok.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers around the table to eat this meal together.
